hero_subtitle: Beautiful, bite-sized and made to impress — canapés that set the tone for your occasion.
samples_intro: A taste of what we’ve served. These are real canapé menus from real events, mixing finger and bowl canapés around a single theme. Each one is a starting point for the conversation. Tap any menu to expand.
cta_subtitle: Tell us about your event and we will create a menu that works perfectly for you.

samples.title: Southeast Asian 50th Birthday
samples.blurb: A bold, fragrant mix of finger and bowl canapés for a milestone birthday — balancing sharper Thai and Vietnamese flavours with rich, slow-cooked bowls that arrived later in the evening.

items: Thai fish cakes with a sweet chilli & lime dipping sauce
Coconut & shiitake mushroom rice balls
Singapore style chicken satays with peanut sauce
Chilli, coriander & lemongrass prawn skewers with a mango, lime & coriander dipping sauce
Thai green vegetable curry with steamed rice
Beef rendang with toasted coconut and steamed rice

samples.title: Mediterranean Theme (garden reception)
samples.blurb: A casual stand-up reception in the garden — sunny Mediterranean flavours, a mix of finger canapés, hearty bowl canapés and a beautiful mini-pavlova finish.

items: Parcels of dried fig and soft goat cheese wrapped in prosciutto
Crostini with 2 toppings: Sicilian caponata; mozzarella & basil with a touch of chilli
Mini spinach & feta filo pies
Tagine of chicken, preserved lemons & olives with couscous
Pea & mint risotto with shaved pecorino
Pork souvlaki with tzatziki in mini pitta bread
Mini pavlovas with orange cream & pomegranate seeds

samples.title: Crowd Pleasers (18th Birthday Party)
samples.blurb: Designed for a younger crowd with hearty appetites — familiar favourites with a touch of polish, all easy to eat standing up, finishing with a proper birthday cake.

items: Mini cocktail sausages with a honey, mustard and sesame glaze
Grilled monkfish & pancetta skewers with rosemary & garlic
Wild mushroom, chevre & thyme tartlets
Baby roasted vegetable pizza slices
Mini burgers with chunky chips
Thai green chicken curry with rice
Butternut squash, chick pea & spinach tagine with couscous
Chocolate birthday cake

samples.title: Sicilian Inspired Spring Menu
samples.blurb: Violent thunderstorms in the night followed by torrential rain in the morning gave way, in the end, to the perfect late spring afternoon. The menu was Italian, incorporating the flavours of Sicily where the hosts had become engaged. Guests were greeted on the lawn with champagne, followed by plenty of hot & cold canapés.

items: Mini porcini arancini with a tomato & garlic dipping sauce
Crostini with Sicilian caponata & toasted almonds
Crostini with pea, mint & feta
Dried fig, soft goat cheese & prosciutto parcels
Grilled monkfish & pancetta skewers marinated in rosemary & garlic
Roasted Mediterranean vegetables, mozzarella, and sun-dried tomato & basil pesto on a china spoon
Local asparagus & lemon risotto with parmesan shavings
Italian-inspired family-style menu — please contact us for full details
